acceptance_criteria:
1. rg "\bclaude-mem\b" packages/ returns 0 hits (except data dir/db path constants and upstream attribution)
2. npm test passes, count >= Phase 0b baseline
3. npm run build-and-sync completes cleanly
4. MCP prompts/list returns 4 skill prompts (totalmem-search, totalmem-plan, totalmem-execute, totalmem-explore)
5. MCP resources/list returns 2 resources (totalmem://context/*, totalmem://sessions/recent)
6. CLAUDE_MEM_WORKER_PORT=37778 npm start works with deprecation log
7. CI green on test branch push (.github/workflows/ passes)
description: Fork claude-mem as totalmem under totalmem-ai/totalmem org. Shift from Claude-plugin-first to MCP-server-first architecture so any MCP-compatible CLI (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Qwen, Codex) can use totalmem without platform-specific plugin installation. Data dir stays ~/.claude-mem/ in v1. Env var prefix changes CLAUDE_MEM_ → TOTALMEM_ with fallback. MCP server gains prompts + resources capabilities. All branding, package names, docs URLs updated.
design: 7-phase plan: 0=research+baseline, 1=monorepo restructure (packages/core + packages/cli-adapters/*), 2=MCP enhance (prompts+resources), 3=rename core identity, 4=rename branding+tags, 5=rename docs+URLs, 6=multi-CLI installer, 7=tests+build. Phases 4+5 parallelize via separate branches. Phase 6 gated by Phase 0a research. P50 estimate 18h, P90 28h. Rollback: git reset HEAD~1 on >20 test failures.
notes: P50=18h, P90=28h. If hitting P90, descope Phase 6 (multi-CLI installer) to follow-up. [Generated by /beadify]
title: Migrate claude-mem to totalmem: MCP-first architecture

acceptance_criteria:
1. CLI config table complete: Qwen CLI config path and MCP server declaration format documented
2. CLI config table complete: Codex CLI config location and MCP server declaration format documented
3. npm ls @modelcontextprotocol/sdk version confirmed
4. SDK prompts and resources capability support confirmed (yes/no)
5. Gemini CLI and Cursor verified to call prompts/list and resources/list (yes/no)
description: Research and document actual MCP config format for each target CLI. Validate MCP SDK prompts/resources support. This is a research gate that blocks Phase 2 (MCP enhancement) and Phase 6 (multi-CLI installer). Without this, unvalidated CLIs default to 'coming soon' in installer.
design: Research tasks: find ~/.qwen/ config structure; find Codex config location; run npm ls @modelcontextprotocol/sdk; test prompts/list and resources/list against Gemini CLI and Cursor. Output: filled CLI config table + SDK version doc. Files to create: docs/research/cli-mcp-configs.md
notes: Gate: Phase 6 blocked until CLI table complete. Phase 2 blocked until SDK capabilities confirmed. [Generated by /beadify]
title: Phase 0a: Research CLI MCP config schemas and SDK capabilities

acceptance_criteria:
1. npm test passes with 0 failures; test count recorded
2. npm run build succeeds
3. File counts recorded: rg "\bCLAUDE_MEM_", rg "docs.claude-mem.ai", rg "\bclaude-mem\b" each piped to wc -l
4. git tag pre-totalmem-baseline created
5. Any pre-existing failures fixed before tagging
description: Run full test suite and build to record baseline metrics before any changes. Count files affected by upcoming renames. Tag the git tree. This baseline is the comparison point for Phase 7 verification (npm test count must be >= this baseline).
design: Run: npm test (record count), npm run build. Then: rg "\bCLAUDE_MEM_" --type ts --type js -c | wc -l; rg "docs.claude-mem.ai" -c | wc -l; rg "\bclaude-mem\b" --type ts --type js --type json -c | wc -l. Fix failures. Run: git tag pre-totalmem-baseline.
notes: Baseline test count must be recorded before Phase 1 starts. [Generated by /beadify]
title: Phase 0b: Establish green baseline before rename

acceptance_criteria:
1. packages/core/src/ contains all former src/ content with working imports
2. packages/cli-adapters/claude-plugin/, gemini-ext/, cursor-hooks/, openclaw/ each exist with correct hook script paths
3. packages/installer/ exists
4. npm test passes after each of the 8 steps (8 separate commits in git log)
5. npm run build passes after step 1.8
6. Root package.json workspaces array populated; each adapter package.json has @totalmem/core: workspace:*
7. .github/workflows/*.yml CI paths updated
description: Move flat src/ layout into packages/core/ and packages/cli-adapters/* monorepo structure. Each of 8 sub-steps is its own commit + npm test run. Rollback rule: >20 test failures after any single step → git reset HEAD~1. Adapter packages reference core via workspace:* protocol. CI paths updated in .github/workflows/.
design: 8-step incremental moves: 1.1 create empty packages/ dirs, 1.2 mv src/→packages/core/src/ + update tsconfig.json, 1.3 mv plugin/→packages/cli-adapters/claude-plugin/ + update hooks.json/sync-marketplace.cjs/build-hooks.js, 1.4 mv gemini-extension/→packages/cli-adapters/gemini-ext/, 1.5 mv cursor-hooks/→packages/cli-adapters/cursor-hooks/, 1.6 mv openclaw/→packages/cli-adapters/openclaw/, 1.7 mv installer/→packages/installer/, 1.8 update root package.json workspaces + CI. Critical files per step documented in plan. Fallback: paths aliases if project references fail.
notes: P10=3h, P50=5h, P90=8h. Each step committed individually for easy rollback. [Generated by /beadify]
title: Phase 1: Monorepo restructure (packages/core + cli-adapters)

acceptance_criteria:
1. MCP prompts/list returns 4 prompts: totalmem-search, totalmem-plan, totalmem-execute, totalmem-explore
2. MCP resources/list returns 2 resources: totalmem://context/{project} and totalmem://sessions/recent
3. resources/read returns empty content (not error) when worker unavailable
4. MCP server name changed from claude-mem to totalmem in server identity
5. Chroma MCP client name changed from claude-mem-chroma to totalmem-chroma
6. Claude Code adapter still uses SKILL.md directly (unchanged behavior)
description: Extend the MCP server with prompts and resources capabilities so non-Claude MCP clients can discover and use totalmem skills without SKILL.md files. All new code in this phase MUST use new totalmem names from the start (not claude-mem), to avoid Phase 3 bulk-rename touching Phase 2 code. Gated by Phase 0a SDK capability confirmation.
design: File: packages/core/src/servers/mcp-server.ts. Add prompts capability: register prompts/list + prompts/get handlers. Prompt schema: name from skill dir (e.g. totalmem-search), description from SKILL.md frontmatter, messages=[{role:user, content:SKILL.md body}]. Resources: totalmem://context/{project}→GET localhost:{port}/api/context/inject?projects={project} (text/plain); totalmem://sessions/recent→GET localhost:{port}/api/search/sessions?limit=10 (application/json). Fallback: empty string/[] on worker unavailable. Use getWorkerPort() from settings.
notes: IMPORTANT: Write all new code using totalmem names — Phase 3 rename does NOT touch Phase 2 files. Gated by Phase 0a SDK check. [Generated by /beadify]
title: Phase 2: MCP server enhancement (prompts + resources)

acceptance_criteria:
1. All CLAUDE_MEM_* env vars renamed to TOTALMEM_* with backward-compat fallback resolver
2. Deprecation warning logged (once per session) when CLAUDE_MEM_* var detected
3. Unit test for settings loading from both TOTALMEM_* and CLAUDE_MEM_* passes
4. Plugin name/key updated in .claude-plugin/*.json, plugin-state.ts, bun-runner.js, smart-install.js
5. Package names updated: root=totalmem, core=@totalmem/server, plugin=totalmem-plugin, installer=totalmem-installer, openclaw=@openclaw/totalmem
6. paths.ts marketplace path: marketplaces/thedotmack → marketplaces/totalmem-ai
7. npm test passes after each sub-step commit
description: Mechanical find-replace of all claude-mem identifiers → totalmem across source code (not docs). 4 sub-steps: env var migration layer, plugin identity, package names, marketplace paths. Validation protocol: after each sd batch, run git diff review + npm test. Rollback rule: npm test fails → git reset HEAD~1 immediately.
design: Regex patterns (word-boundary): \bclaude-mem\b→totalmem, \bCLAUDE_MEM_→TOTALMEM_, \bclaudeMem\b→totalMem, \bClaudeMem\b→TotalMem, \bclaude_mem\b→totalmem, \bthedotmack\b→totalmem-ai. Exclusions: ~/.claude-mem/ paths, claude-mem.db refs, cm__ Chroma prefix, upstream changelog attribution, third-party imports. Use sd with -s flag for literal strings, word-boundary regex otherwise. 3a: SettingsDefaultsManager.ts env migration. 3b: plugin files. 3c: package.json files. 3d: paths.ts + sync-marketplace.cjs.
notes: Phase 2 code already uses totalmem names — exclude from sd batch. Do NOT rename: ~/.claude-mem/, claude-mem.db, cm__ prefix. [Generated by /beadify]
title: Phase 3: Rename core identity (env vars, plugin, packages, marketplace)

design: Agent A owns: packages/core/src/utils/, packages/core/src/ui/, packages/cli-adapters/openclaw/, packages/cli-adapters/cursor-hooks/. Must NOT touch: docs/, README.md, root config files. Runs on separate branch, merged sequentially after Phase 5. Same sd rollback protocol as Phase 3.
notes: Parallel with Phase 5 — separate git branches, merged sequentially. Stale tag cleanup v2 milestone: totalmem migrate-context utility. [Generated by /beadify]

acceptance_criteria:

Each CLI gets IDE-selection option and MCP registration logic writing a stdio MCP server entry pointing to @totalmem/server. Claude-specific extras (marketplace, hooks, skills) only run when claude-code selected.
design: Files: packages/installer/src/steps/ide-selection.ts (add gemini-cli + coming-soon entries). New file per CLI: packages/installer/src/steps/register-mcp-{claude,gemini,cursor}.ts. Each writes mcpServers.totalmem entry pointing to local @totalmem/server install (stdio mode). Qwen/Codex entries added only after Phase 0a confirms config format.
notes: GATED by Phase 0a (CLI config table) and Phase 5 (docs done). Descope this to follow-up PR if hitting P90 estimate. [Generated by /beadify]
